gist.headline: Fireworks in the garden
gist.blurb: We just added Qwen3.5 397B to the text API via Fireworks. With a massive 262K context window and reasoning capabilities, this MoE giant is ready to chew through your heaviest prompts.
gist.summary: Added the Qwen3.5 397B A17B (MoE) model to the text generation API via Fireworks AI.
gist.impact: Users can now access Qwen3.5's massive 262K context window, vision, and reasoning capabilities through the standard text endpoint.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a massive new model (Qwen) via the Fireworks AI provider. Visual metaphor: literal fireworks in a cozy night garden. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot watching a beautiful, soft-glowing firework display over their digital garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot sitting on a grassy hill, watching soft pastel fireworks explode in the night sky. A glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plant sprouts next to them. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot sitting on a grassy hill, watching soft pastel fireworks explode in the night sky.
